# The Saunter Group

> Two proprietary diagnostics for operators scaling under load. BAIC reads the business as a system. LDNA reads the leaders inside it. Build what endures.

The Saunter Group is the licensed operator of two diagnostics owned by Vertical Consulting: **BAIC** (Business Architecture & Intelligence Cycle) and **LDNA** (Leadership Drivers & Natural Aptitudes). The firm delivers architecture-grade diagnostics for operator-led businesses scaling roughly $300K to $5M per month, and for acquirers stress-testing diligence targets before close.

## What Saunter does

- **BAIC** — a 30-day evidence-based diagnostic of eight business domains (Strategy, Structure & Accountability, Systems & Processes, Financial Controls, Revenue Engine, Data & Dashboards, Risk & Compliance, Leadership Capacity). The output is a ranked vulnerability register, a 90-day execution blueprint, and a hosted dashboard tracking the Architecture Maturity Index (AMI) across quarterly re-scores. The analytical core is VMOCA (Vulnerability Mechanism Outcome & Criticality Analysis), adapted from systems-engineering risk frameworks. **Engagements start at $25,000.**

- **LDNA** — a six-minute behavioral assessment that scores leaders across seven dimensions (Drive & Independence, Social Energy, Pace & Patience, Structure & Order, Creative Battery, Logic & Analysis, Vision & Ideas) using a two-part natural-vs-adapted word checklist grounded in established behavioral science. Returns a 2-page report. **Free.**

The two instruments stack: BAIC diagnoses the company, LDNA diagnoses the leaders inside it. Saunter runs both alongside an ongoing governance layer (hosted dashboard, quarterly re-score, executive advisory cadence).

## Who it's for

Operators (founders and CEOs) between approximately $300K and $5M per month whose company has outgrown the architecture that got them here. Also acquirers (SBA-financed search funders, holdcos, and strategics) running diagnostic diligence on targets 30 to 60 days before close.

## Who is behind the methodology

Ryan "Gus" Roberts founded The Saunter Group. He served as an Air Force fighter pilot and senior strategy officer, then spent a decade-plus modeling systems risk for the Department of Defense alongside major contractors and weapons manufacturers, then built and sold a defense contracting firm.

A private Technical Advisory Board sits behind the IP at Vertical Consulting, contributing to methodology, scoring rubrics, and peer review.

## Two doors to start

1. **Take the LDNA** (six minutes, free, 2-page report): https://thesauntergroup.com/ldna/
2. **Run the Fit Assessment** (eight questions to qualify for BAIC): https://thesauntergroup.com/start/

Or book a 30-minute diagnostic call: https://app.usemotion.com/meet/Saunter/BusinessArchitecture
